---
name: Finding review
about: Propose or review a scientific finding tied to evidence and methods
title: "[Finding] "
labels: finding
---

## Hypothesis / claim

State in falsifiable terms (see `docs/METHODOLOGY.md`).

## Evidence

- Data sources (versions, links, manifests):
- Methods / protocol links:
- Key results (results vs interpretation separated):

## Limitations and alternatives

## Falsification

What would convince you this claim is wrong or too strong?

## Links

Related issues, PRs, commits, or `methods/` files.
